title: Patch<T> Deserialize: doc comment references Option implementation detail
description: The Deserialize impl comment says 'Option::deserialize maps: JSON null → None, JSON value → Some(T)' — this explains the impl strategy but not the semantic contract. A contributor reading this thinks in Options, not Patches. Replace with: 'JSON absent (via #[serde(default)]) → Keep; JSON null → Clear; JSON value → Set(v).' That matches the public API semantics documented on the enum.
